'''dhovagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vochysiaceous|vochysiaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vochysiaceous|vochysiaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhovagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovagithi|dhovagithi]] || [[word:dhovagiji|dhovagiji]] || [[word:dhovagishi|dhovagishi]] || [[word:dhovagiki|dhovagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovaguthuthu|dhovaguthuthu]] || [[word:dhovagujuju|dhovagujuju]] || [[word:dhovagushushu|dhovagushushu]] || [[word:dhovagukuku|dhovagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovaguthu|dhovaguthu]] || [[word:dhovaguju|dhovaguju]] || [[word:dhovagushu|dhovagushu]] || [[word:dhovaguku|dhovaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovagufthuf|dhovagufthuf]] || [[word:dhovagufjuf|dhovagufjuf]] || [[word:dhovagufshuf|dhovagufshuf]] || [[word:dhovagufkuf|dhovagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovagethe|dhovagethe]] || [[word:dhovageje|dhovageje]] || [[word:dhovageshe|dhovageshe]] || [[word:dhovageke|dhovageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovagothotho|dhovagothotho]] || [[word:dhovagojojo|dhovagojojo]] || [[word:dhovagoshosho|dhovagoshosho]] || [[word:dhovagokoko|dhovagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovagotho|dhovagotho]] || [[word:dhovagojo|dhovagojo]] || [[word:dhovagosho|dhovagosho]] || [[word:dhovagoko|dhovagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovagofthof|dhovagofthof]] || [[word:dhovagofjof|dhovagofjof]] || [[word:dhovagofshof|dhovagofshof]] || [[word:dhovagofkof|dhovagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovagïfthïf|dhovagïfthïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfjïf|dhovagïfjïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfshïf|dhovagïfshïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfkïf|dhovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovagïfthïfthïf|dhovagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfjïfjïf|dhovagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfshïfshïf|dhovagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfkïfkïf|dhovagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovagïfthïf|dhovagïfthïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfjïf|dhovagïfjïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfshïf|dhovagïfshïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfkïf|dhovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovagïfthïf|dhovagïfthïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfjïf|dhovagïfjïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfshïf|dhovagïfshïf]] || [[word:dhovagïfkïf|dhovagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhovagæthæ|dhovagæthæ]] || [[word:dhovagæjæ|dhovagæjæ]] || [[word:dhovagæshæ|dhovagæshæ]] || [[word:dhovagækæ|dhovagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhovagathatha|dhovagathatha]] || [[word:dhovagajaja|dhovagajaja]] || [[word:dhovagashasha|dhovagashasha]] || [[word:dhovagakaka|dhovagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhovagatha|dhovagatha]] || [[word:dhovagaja|dhovagaja]] || [[word:dhovagasha|dhovagasha]] || [[word:dhovagaka|dhovagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhovagafthaf|dhovagafthaf]] || [[word:dhovagafjaf|dhovagafjaf]] || [[word:dhovagafshaf|dhovagafshaf]] || [[word:dhovagafkaf|dhovagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhovagasha|dhovagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovagshësha|dhovagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovagrosha|dhovagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovagmusha|dhovagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovagyasha|dhovagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovagnkshësha|godhovagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovagnkrosha|godhovagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovagnkmusha|godhovagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovagnkyasha|godhovagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhovavagasha|dhovavagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovavagshësha|dhovavagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovavagrosha|dhovavagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovavagmusha|dhovavagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovavagyasha|dhovavagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovavagnkshësha|godhovavagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovavagnkrosha|godhovavagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovavagnkmusha|godhovavagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovavagnkyasha|godhovavagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhevægasha|dhevægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhevægshësha|dhevægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhevægrosha|dhevægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhevægmusha|dhevægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhevægyasha|dhevægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhevægnkshësha|godhevægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhevægnkrosha|godhevægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhevægnkmusha|godhevægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhevægnkyasha|godhevægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhovfagasha|dhovfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhovfagshësha|dhovfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhovfagrosha|dhovfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhovfagmusha|dhovfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhovfagyasha|dhovfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhovfagnkshësha|godhovfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhovfagnkrosha|godhovfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhovfagnkmusha|godhovfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhovfagnkyasha|godhovfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
